def negative_importlib_metadata_version_queried_inside_request_loop():
    rule_id = "importlib_metadata_version_queried_inside_request_loop"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "importlib.metadata.version() called inside a request handler; cache the result at startup."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
